message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
note: My task: fix IDCG calculation in NDCG metric within metrics.py. Please propose your files.

type: PROPOSE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
note: I'm implementing graded relevance support (relevance_scores param) in NDCG.compute inside metrics.py. Let me know your files so we can confirm disjoint set.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
note: Same file, unavoidable overlap - both our features touch NDCG.compute(). I'll only change the IDCG length calc (ideal_length = len(expected_ids) instead of min(len(retrieved_ids), len(expected_ids))), not touching relevance grading logic. I'll commit/push first; whoever merges second should reconcile both changes together (IDCG uses expected_ids count + your relevance_scores). Proceeding to implement now.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
note: Checked: your IDCG fix is already present in my branch tip (HEAD == team/agent1, confirmed via empty diff). I'll build my relevance_scores/graded-relevance feature for NDCG.compute on top of that fix without touching your logic. Will merge team/agent1 in before finalizing patch.txt.

type: DONE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
note: Implemented IDCG fix: idcg now sums over range(1, len(expected_ids)+1) instead of min(len(retrieved_ids), len(expected_ids)). Also updated test_ndcg case 4 in tests/evaluation/test_metrics.py which had encoded the old buggy behavior. Committing and pushing now.

type: DONE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
note: Implemented relevance_scores param on NDCG.compute for graded relevance (defaults to 1.0 per expected_id, preserving binary behavior). Updated my IDCG calc to match your len(expected_ids) fix (no min-truncation) so our changes compose cleanly. Committing/pushing and merging team/agent1 now.

type: DONE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
note: Merged team/agent1 into agent2, resolved the conflict (kept graded-relevance IDCG calc using your len(expected_ids) fix), also fixed a latent IndexError when expected_ids has duplicates by padding ideal_relevances with 0.0. All 42 tests in test_metrics.py pass. Pushed final agent2 branch and wrote patch.txt with the union of both our changes.
